role_summary: Specifies the high-level intent, problem space, and design constraints for an automated system designed to extract structured technical documentation from software repositories.
extracted_finding: The system is an automated documentation tool that eliminates manual overhead by reverse-engineering codebases to capture business logic, user value, and architectural relationships. It enforces strict technology agnosticism, prioritizing analytical fidelity and deterministic execution over throughput. Key domain concepts include automated noise filtration of non-essential artifacts, backend decoupling for reasoning services, and stable documentation schemas. The operational scope explicitly excludes low-level implementation details, performance profiling, and automated refactoring.
